info.description: API REST para la gestión de la clínica veterinaria: autenticación, usuarios, clientes, empleados, mascotas, citas, pagos y notificaciones.
info.title: API Clínica Veterinaria

get.description: Paginated search of all appointments with filters. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Creates a new appointment, optionally assigned to an employee via query param. Requires admin or manager role.

201.description: Appointment created (data contains new appointment ID)

get.description: Returns a single appointment by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

put.description: Updates general info (reason, notes, service) of an appointment. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Deletes an appointment. Soft-delete by default; pass hard=true for permanent deletion. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Cancels an appointment, with optional employee and reason. Requires admin or manager role.
Marks an appointment as completed, with optional employee and notes. Requires admin or manager role.
Confirms an appointment and assigns the employee given in the query param. Requires admin or manager role.
Marks an appointment as not attended, with optional employee. Requires admin or manager role.
Reschedules an appointment to a new date/time. Requires admin or manager role.
Disables 2FA for the authenticated user. Requires Bearer auth.
Enables 2FA for the authenticated user (method: totp, sms, or email). Requires Bearer auth.
Completes login by verifying the two-factor code. Returns new session payload. Requires Bearer auth.
Activates a user account using the user ID and activation code (e.g. from email link). Supports query params or JSON body.

parameters.description: Alternative: JSON body with user_id and code
parameters.name: body

post.description: Authenticates with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens. If 2FA is enabled, data contains dtos.RequiresTwoFactorResponse instead of the session.

200.description: Login successful (session payload with tokens and user)

post.description: Invalidates the current session (refresh token). Requires Bearer auth.
Invalidates all refresh tokens for the authenticated user. Requires Bearer auth.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token. Requires Bearer auth.
Creates a new user account (admin, customer, or employee). Admins get immediate access; others may require activation.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

post.description: Sends a password reset link/code to the given email. Requires Bearer auth.

200.description: If email exists, reset link sent

post.description: Resets the user password using email and the code received by email. Requires Bearer auth.

get.description: Paginated search/filter of customers. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Creates a new customer. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns a single customer by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

put.description: Updates an existing customer by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a customer by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns paginated appointments for a given customer. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted customer. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Paginated search/filter of employees. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Creates a new employee. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns paginated appointments assigned to the authenticated employee. Requires employee or manager role.

post.description: Creates an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee. Requires employee or manager role.

201.description: Appointment created (data contains new appointment ID)

get.description: Returns a single appointment assigned to the authenticated employee. Requires employee or manager role.
get.summary: Get my assigned appointment by ID (employee)

put.description: Updates general info (reason, notes, service) of an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee. Requires employee or manager role.

post.description: Cancels an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee. Requires employee or manager role.
Marks an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee as completed. Requires employee or manager role.
Confirms an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee. Requires employee or manager role.
Marks an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee as not attended. Requires employee or manager role.
post.summary: Mark my appointment as not attended (employee)

post.description: Reschedules an appointment assigned to the authenticated employee to a new date/time. Requires employee or manager role.

get.description: Returns a single employee by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

put.description: Updates an existing employee by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an employee by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns paginated appointments for a given employee. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted employee. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Check if the API is running
Returns paginated appointments for the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.

post.description: Submits an appointment request as a customer. Requires customer role.

get.description: Returns a single appointment belonging to the authenticated customer. Requires customer role.
Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user. Requires any authenticated role.
Returns a single notification by ID for the authenticated user. Requires any authenticated role.

post.description: Manually sends a notification through the given channel (email, sms). Requires employee, manager, or admin role.

get.description: Returns paginated notifications filtered by delivery channel (email, sms). Requires employee, manager, or admin role.
Returns a summary of sent notifications, optionally filtered by sender. Requires employee, manager, or admin role.
Returns paginated notifications filtered by type. Requires employee, manager, or admin role.
Returns a single notification by ID. Requires employee, manager, or admin role.
Returns a single payment by ID.
Returns paginated appointments for a given pet. Requires admin or manager role.
Returns the authenticated user's profile. Requires Bearer auth.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile (name, gender, date of birth, photo, bio). Requires Bearer auth.

get.description: Paginated search and filter of users. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Creates a new user. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns a single user by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user by ID. Requires admin or manager role.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted user. Requires admin or manager role.
Updates the status of a user (e.g. activate/deactivate). Requires admin or manager role.

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: User ID and activation code (e.g. from email link). Supports query params or JSON body.
Request body for creating a new appointment

customer_id.description:
ID of the customer making the appointment
Required: true

pet_id.description:
ID of the pet for the appointment
Required: true

reason.description:
Reason for the appointment
Required: true

scheduled_date.description:
Date and time of the appointment
Required: true
Format: RFC3339

status.description:
Status of the appointment
Required: false (defaults to "scheduled")

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: Pet ID, scheduled date/time, reason, service, optional notes. Customer ID is taken from auth.
Appointment entity: id, pet_id, customer_id, employee_id, service, datetime, status, reason, notes, timestamps.
Optional customer_id, vet_id, pet_id, service, status, reason, start_date, end_date, has_notes, plus pagination.
Optional reason, notes, and service. Only provided fields are updated.

notes.description: Optional: Additional notes or observations about the appointment

reason.description: Optional: Reason for updating the appointment

service.description: Optional: Service type for the appointment (e.g., "checkup", "vaccination", "surgery")

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: Request body for creating a new user account

email.description:
Email address of the user
Required: true
Example: user@example.com``

password.description:
Plain text password (will be hashed)
Required: true
Minimum length: 8 characters

phone_number.description:
Phone number of the user
Required: false
Example: +1234567890

role.description:
Role of the user (admin, veterinarian, customer, receptionist)
Required: true
Example: customer

status.description:
Initial status of the user account
Required: false (defaults to "pending")
Example: active

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: First name, last name, email, gender, date of birth, optional photo URL, is_active, and optional user_id to link account.
Customer entity: id, name, gender, date of birth, photo, user_id, is_active, timestamps.
Pagination plus optional search text and is_active filter.

search.description: Optional text search over first and last name.

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: ID (required) plus optional fields to update. ID can also be taken from URL path.
Name, gender, date of birth, photo, license number, years experience, specialty, schedule, optional is_active.
Employee entity: id, name, gender, date of birth, photo, license, specialty, years experience, is_active, user_id, timestamps.
Day of week, entry/departure time (0-23), optional break window.
Pagination plus optional specialty and is_active filter.
ID (required) plus optional fields and optional schedule.
2FA method: totp, sms, or email.
Email, password, and optional two_factor_code when 2FA is enabled.
Refresh token to revoke for the current session.
Notification entity: id, user_id, user_email, user_phone, title, subject, message, type, channel, created_at.

user_id.description: ID of the target user (if any)

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: Payment entity: id, amount, currency, status, method, transaction_id, description, due_date, paid_at, customer_id, timestamps, optional refund/delete info.
User profile details
Authenticated user's profile: id, email, phone, role, status, name, gender, date of birth, profile picture URL, bio.
Refresh token string to exchange for new access and refresh tokens.
Request body for user registration. Role: admin, veterinarian, customer, or receptionist. Admins get immediate access; others may require activation.
Email address to send the password reset link/code to.
New date/time (RFC3339) and optional reason.

datetime.description: @Required Required: New date and time for the appointment (RFC3339 format)

reason.description: Optional: Reason for rescheduling the appointment

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: Email, code received by email, and new password.
Channel (email/sms), type, optional user_id, user_email (for email), user_phone (for sms), title, subject, message, optional token (e.g. reset link).
Contains access token, refresh token, and minimal user info.
JWT token string, expiry time, and type (e.g. Bearer).
Authenticated user's profile fields to update (name, gender, date of birth, photo URL, bio).
Request body for updating user account status

status.description:
New status (active, inactive, banned)
Required: true

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: User identifier, email, and role returned in login/session payloads.
User account information (excluding sensitive data)

customer_id.description:
ID of the associated customer (for customer users)
Example: 789

email.description:
Email address of the user
Example: user@example.com

email_verified.description:
Whether the email has been verified
Example: true

employee_id.description:
ID of the associated employee (for staff users)
Example: 456

id.description:
Unique identifier for the user
Example: 123

phone_number.description:
Phone number of the user
Example: +1234567890

role.description:
Role of the user (admin, veterinarian, customer, receptionist)
Example: customer

status.description:
Status of the user account (active, inactive, banned, pending)
Example: active

two_factor_enabled.description:
Whether two-factor authentication is enabled
Example: false

clinic-vet-api_internal_infrastructure_h.description: One-time 2FA code (TOTP or backup code).

data.description: The data payload of the response for successful requests.

error.description: Details of the error if the request was not successful.

message.description: A message providing additional context about the response.

meta.description: Additional metadata for the response, such as pagination info.

request_id.description: A unique identifier for the request.

success.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

details.description: A map of specific error details, often used for validation errors.

stack.description: The error stack trace (for development purposes).
